summary: Critical flaws: (1) Action refs not pinned to SHAs—uses @v4/@v2 instead of commit SHAs. (2) No Bun unit tests despite explicit requirement: 'All tests must be runnable with `bun test`'—only act shell tests exist. (3) Massive repetition in workflow test jobs (lines 50–119): test-minor-bump, test-major-bump, test-version-file jobs are near-identical duplicates. Should be composite action or matrix job. Scripts (semantic-version.ts, conventional-commits.ts, bump-version.ts) are well-written with good types/error handling, but workflow maintenance is fragile—changing Bun setup requires 5 edits. Missing actionlint validation in workflow itself.
